acceptance_targets: [CH10-F001] PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:47-53 ends with one concrete unresolved risk/action tied to Ravi's opposition after the report is submitted; FAIL if the same span ends in full interpersonal settlement plus institutional reassurance.

[CH10-F002] PASS if the revised lines show at least one concrete consequence of Ravi's coercion attempt (stated retaliation, withdrawal, or imposed condition) before scene end, and the final beat preserves unresolved discomfort; FAIL if the same section still resolves with a comforting or triumphant release beat.

[CH10-F003] PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:31 contains a specific threatening action or verbal condition that a reader can identify without narrator explanation; FAIL if the beat still relies on abstract phrasing like 'the threat' without concrete manifestation.

[CH10-F004] PASS if in revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:29-43 no more than two consecutive sentences are pure policy without an adjacent character reaction beat; FAIL if multi-sentence policy blocks still stand without embodied interruption.

[FBR-02] PASS if chapter 8 and chapter 10 clearly refer to distinct full names with no overlap and no reader could infer an impossible age/role shift; FAIL if the same full name still maps to both the junior player and the adult staff role.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:47-53 ends with one concrete unresolved risk/action tied to Ravi's opposition after the report is submitted; FAIL if the same span ends in full interpersonal settlement plus institutional reassurance.
findings.problem: The chapter's central power conflict peaks when Ravi pushes Anika to falsify pain data, but the beat resolves too quickly into compliance and a stabilizing close. That rapid de-escalation weakens forward causal pressure after promising a harder authority struggle.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the closing conflict in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:47, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:49, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:53 so Anika's truthful report still stands, but Ravi's resistance leaves an explicit unresolved consequence (behavioral, relational, or procedural) that carries into the next chapter.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised lines show at least one concrete consequence of Ravi's coercion attempt (stated retaliation, withdrawal, or imposed condition) before scene end, and the final beat preserves unresolved discomfort; FAIL if the same section still resolves with a comforting or triumphant release beat.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift: a coercive parent-child moment (pressure to underreport medical risk) is blunted by immediate softening and a neat compliance payoff. The narrative installs a safety valve instead of dwelling in the full discomfort and cost of the coercion attempt.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:47, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:49, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:53 to keep concrete stakes live after Anika enters truthful numbers: show immediate interpersonal or practical fallout before any partial cooling, and remove interpretive language that reassures the reader too quickly.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:31 contains a specific threatening action or verbal condition that a reader can identify without narrator explanation; FAIL if the beat still relies on abstract phrasing like 'the threat' without concrete manifestation.
findings.problem: Timidity/summary replaces scene specificity at a critical pressure point: the narration says Ravi's lowered voice made 'the threat clearer' but does not concretize the threat mechanism in that beat.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:31 so the threat is rendered through explicit language, gesture, or immediate consequence cue instead of abstract narrator labeling.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if in revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:29-43 no more than two consecutive sentences are pure policy without an adjacent character reaction beat; FAIL if multi-sentence policy blocks still stand without embodied interruption.
findings.problem: Procedural exposition crowds the dramatic line in the chapter's back half: protocol and legal wording run in long blocks, reducing embodied consequence density during a scene that should escalate through behavior.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten and redistribute policy delivery across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:29, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:41, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:43 by inserting immediate reaction beats (body language, interior calculation, or action) after each key rule statement.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if chapter 8 and chapter 10 clearly refer to distinct full names with no overlap and no reader could infer an impossible age/role shift; FAIL if the same full name still maps to both the junior player and the adult staff role.
findings.problem: Character-identity continuity collision: "Marisol Vega" appears as a junior tournament opponent in chapter 8 and as an adult compliance coordinator with a child in chapter 10, creating unresolved identity ambiguity.
findings.rewrite_direction: Disambiguate names by renaming one role and propagating consistently across snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2805, snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2843, snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2851, snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3684, snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3690, and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3693.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when it changes behavior: pain detail, debt arithmetic, manipulative care, and mixed motives. In edge cases, prefer the truest in-character action over protective narration, then carry the real consequence forward instead of immediately moralizing it away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If coercion, grief, injury, or economic shame appears, language must stay specific and embodied; vague softening triggers mandatory rewrite.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for formal authority, deliberate emphasis, or emotional freezing.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count and dialogue density chapter to chapter: rotate match compression, slow inventory aftermath, institutional pressure scenes, and quiet domestic intervals so adjacent chapters do not share the same structural pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary diction with class-aware specificity; avoid abstract therapy language unless a character would actually use it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored in Anika for most chapters, with brief controlled slips toward Ravi in designated confrontation and aftermath chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate clipped athletic sequences with longer reflective cadences; sentence length should track exertion, shame, and release.
